desc: The New English bridle from Dy'on combines minimalist design with functional ergonomics. It is specifically designed for the well-being and performance of the horse. The braided combination noseband, which is removable, not only offers an appealing aesthetic but also optimal freedom of movement for the horse. The S-shape of the headpiece ensures that the horse's ears can move freely, providing additional comfort. The round braided leather details add an elegant touch to the bridle, while the roller buckle closure with protective padding ensures a secure and comfortable fit. desc: The first connected multi-tool hair styler and dryer that allows you to create customised curls at the touch of a button. The addition of three new attachments enhances the multi-tool's versatility and performance - designed for all hair types without heat damage. Connectivity and beauty combined in Dyson's first connected appliance - the Airwrap i.d. multi-hair styler and dryer. Users can personalise their hair profile and automatically create, style and set their curls at the touch of a button. The versatility of the Dyson Airwrap i.d. name: New English Collection
desc: This high-quality leather hackamore is designed for riders seeking precise communication with their horse while ensuring maximum comfort. The fully detachable design allows for easy cleaning and adjustment to your needs, while the combination of a robust metal alloy and soft, protective padding guarantees exceptional durability and optimal well-being for the horse. Perfect for sensitive horses or those that work better without a bit. Features: This hackamore has been developed with a horse-centered approach that prioritizes comfort without compromising control. The wide nose padding and strategically placed protective pads help distribute pressure evenly. The metal alloy sides allow for precise control while remaining gentle and ensuring clear communication without excessive force. The fully adjustable fit allows it to perfectly conform to your horse's head shape, and the detachable design makes cleaning or replacing parts easy. Combine it with matching high-quality leather accessories and premium reins for a harmonious and professional set, suitable for both arena work and trail rides. name: V12 Detect Slim Absolute
desc: Dyson's lightest cordless hoover with a high suction power of 150 AW. Up to 60 minutes run time2 including rechargeable battery (second battery sold separately). Floor nozzle with dust detection technology makes invisible dust on hard floors visible - so you don't miss a thing. A piezoelectric sensor continuously calculates the number and size of dust particles vacuumed up - and automatically increases the suction power if necessary. The trigger no longer needs to be held down. This makes it easy to change hands when manoeuvring around obstacles. How often does a product of this brand in the «Vacuum cleaners» category have a defect within the first 24 months? How many working days on average does it take to process a warranty claim from when it arrives at the service centre until it’s back with the customer? How often is a product of this brand in the «Vacuum cleaners» category returned? In the test, the Dyson V12 Slim Absolute proves to be a good, if not outstanding offshoot of the well-known hoover manufacturer. Weighing only 1.4 kg in the hand, it is one of the lighter, top-heavy vacuums. What it gains in handling, it loses somewhat in suction power and features compared to other Dyson vacuum cleaners. Yet it is just as loud and only slightly cheaper than its "big" siblings.

name: V15s Detect Submarine
desc: The powerful Dyson V15s Detect Submarine hoover is now also available with a mopping function for wet cleaning of hard floors. The Dyson Submarine floor attachment with wet roller continuously cleans floors with clean water. Removes damp and dry dirt at the same time. The wet roller rotates 900 times per minute, removing dirt with each revolution. 8 moistening points wet the roller evenly across the entire width to effectively clean the floor and prevent dripping, as well as remove liquids and stubborn stains. The cordless hoover from Dyson with high suction power and intelligent technology. Up to 60 minutes running time and rechargeable battery with exchangeable function (one battery included, additional battery can be ordered separately if required). The light beam detects otherwise invisible particles. A precisely aligned light beam makes invisible dust on hard floors visible - so you won't miss a thing. A piezoelectric sensor continuously calculates the number and size of dust particles vacuumed up - and automatically increases the suction power if necessary. The LCD display shows the quantity and size of the vacuumed dust particles in real time. Dyson's fully sealed, five-stage filtration system removes dust and traps 99.99% of particles down to 0.3 microns in size. With extensive accessories: Submarine wet floor roller, Digital Motorbar floor nozzle, floor nozzle with dust detection technology, combi accessory nozzle, crevice nozzle, hair nozzle, collection container, wall bracket, charger. However, the fact that the button had to be constantly pressed during use and the fresh water tank had to be refilled comparatively frequently without the appliance letting you know was an inconvenience...

name: WashG1
desc: The WashG1 is a versatile vacuum cleaner designed to handle both wet and dry debris with ease. The vacuum features a self-clean cycle that flushes the system, making it ready for the next use. name: Armoured weapon steel cats
desc: The ICM DS3524 model building kit presents two formidable World War II armored vehicles in 1:35 scale: the Pz.Kpfw.V Panther Ausf.D and Pz.Kpfw.VI Ausf.B King Tiger. These German tanks represent significant developments in armored warfare technology during the latter stages of the conflict. The Panther medium tank features a distinctive sloped armor design and is equipped with a powerful 75 mm long-barrel gun, while the King Tiger heavy tank mounts an even more formidable 88 mm main gun with substantial frontal armor protection. This plastic model kit contains detailed components for constructing both vehicles with historical accuracy. The parts feature authentic surface details including weld seams, bolt patterns, and textured armor surfaces characteristic of these armored fighting vehicles. Both models include detailed turret assemblies with precisely rendered main guns, vision ports, and commander's cupolas. The running gear systems feature individual road wheels and track links that capture the mechanical complexity of these military vehicles. The Panther model measures approximately 18 cm in length when completed, while the larger King Tiger reaches about 22 cm. This dual kit provides modelers with an opportunity to build two iconic armored vehicles from the same historical period, allowing for comparative study of their design features and combat roles. The models are suitable for intermediate to advanced model builders seeking historically accurate military vehicle replicas. Assembly requires standard modeling tools and adhesives, with painting recommended to achieve proper military camouflage schemes. These scale models serve as educational tools for understanding armored vehicle development and military history, making them appropriate for display in collections, dioramas, or educational settings. The plastic components are molded in high-quality polystyrene with clear instruction guidance for proper assembly sequence. Whether you want to capture everyday moments or breathtaking landscapes, the Mini 4K opens up new perspectives that will make your memories come alive. The Mini 4K supports HD video transmissions over distances of up to 10 km and offers excellent interference resistance, allowing you to fly further and see more clearly. With a maximum battery life of 31 minutes, you have more than enough time to capture the perfect shot. Thanks to its robust construction, the Mini 4K flies stably even in winds of up to 38 km/h and can take off at altitudes of up to 4,000 m. The Mini 4K is particularly suitable for beginners, as the DJI Fly app provides clear instructions and easy-to-understand flight guides. With just a tap of your finger, you can take off or land the drone, and thanks to the stable hover function, your aircraft remains safely in the air. The automatic return function adds extra safety, assisting you in returning due to low battery or safety concerns. With this extensive equipment, you are well-equipped to let your imagination run wild and soar to creative heights. The DJI Mini 4K Fly More Combo provides you with everything you need to experience your flying adventures even more intensely. DJI Mini 4K Fly More Combo

name: Osmo Pocket 3
desc: The Pocket 3 features a powerful 1-inch CMOS sensor that enables detailed images at any time and delivers impressive shots even in low light conditions. With 4K/120 fps, you can enjoy every breathtaking moment in slow motion. The special optimization of image quality brings night shots of the Pocket 3 to life, showcasing scenes with poor lighting through clear details and authentic colors. The rotatable 2-inch touchscreen allows for a quick switch between horizontal and vertical shooting. A simple twist, and you're ready to go. With the Pocket 3's full-pixel fast focus, you can effortlessly achieve sharp focus on even your fastest-moving subjects. There's also a Product Showcase mode that prioritizes the foreground and can quickly and smoothly focus on a subject—ideal for livestreams and product presentations. Capturing smooth footage has never been easier. With mechanical 3-axis stabilization, the camera view remains stable even during dynamic camera movements. Choose from several stabilization levels, from an ultra-responsive standard level to even higher levels that can handle more intense shaking. Stereo recordings and the direct connection to two DJI Mic 2 transmitters ensure crystal-clear sound and effortless content creation. The Pocket 3 is packed with creative modes and features to keep your inspiration flowing at full speed. It supports SpinShot, Motionlapse, digital zoom, panorama, and much more, all just a few taps away. DJI Osmo Pocket 3 DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Creator Combo

name: Mini 4 Pro (RC 2)
desc: Mini at its best Six key points of sale Overview : Achieve prowess with Mini DJI Mini 4 Pro is our most advanced mini camera drone to date. It features powerful imaging capabilities, omni-directional obstacle detection, ActiveTrack 360° with a new tracking mode, and 20km FHD video transmission, to delight pros and beginners alike.

name: Flip (RC 2)
desc: The DJI Flip impresses with its compact design and exceptional shooting capabilities. It supports palm launch without remote control, allowing you to capture moments on the go easier than ever before. In addition, the AI subject tracking function ensures that the main subject remains perfectly framed, allowing you to capture captivating shots with ease. The innovative design of the foldable, full-surface propeller guard combines a lightweight construction with optimum safety. Whether you're shooting distant landscapes or close-up portraits, the DJI Flip brings visual beauty to every image. DJI Flip is the first drone from DJI to be equipped with a foldable, full-surface propeller guard. The guard is made of a carbon fibre support structure that is only 1/60th the weight of conventional PC material with the same rigidity. This lightweight and robust design provides comprehensive protection so that even beginners can take to the skies with confidence. At less than 249g, the DJI Flip weighs about as much as an apple and fits in the palm of your hand. In most countries and regions, no training or testing is required to fly them. Compact and practical, they are your ideal travel companions, changing the way you capture your favourite moments. DJI Flip simplifies your flight controls. Simply press the mode button on the side to select your desired shooting mode and Flip will do the rest automatically to capture stunning shots. Whether you're a professional photographer or just starting out, you can easily embark on a journey into aerial photography. With AI subject tracking, you can quickly and accurately put your subject in the spotlight. Whether you're hiking through forests or climbing steep peaks, DJI Flip acts like your personal director, capturing your every move with precision.

name: Mini 3 with RC Controller
desc: The DJI Mini 3 is a compact, ultra-lightweight camera drone, ready for any adventure. It offers extended battery life, stunning 4K HDR video to capture true-to-life colour and detail, and interesting functions such as true vertical shooting for great social media shots. Whether you're walking on the beach, backpacking on the weekend or travelling for a month, you'll be ready to capture every moment. With a foldable design and weighing less than 249g, the DJI Mini 3 is easy to stow in your bag for your next adventure. Stop worrying about low battery and enjoy your shots in peace. The DJI Mini 3 comes with the Intelligent Flight Battery to provide up to 38 minutes of flight time. Shoot day and night in dazzling 4K HDR with lifelike colours. The Mini 3's camera is equipped with a 1/1.3 CMOS sensor with dual-native ISO and chip-level HDR technology. Capture light and shadow details during the day for more nuanced visual results with greater depth. Capture clear and vibrant shots even as day fades into night. The camera's f/1.7 aperture and larger 2.4 µm 4-in-1 pixels capture clear details and present exceptional images even in low light. And with the 4x zoom, you can explore more distant places before you start shooting.

name: Osmo Action 6 Standard Combo
desc: The Osmo Action 6 combines an innovative variable aperture with a square 1/1.1-inch sensor. With a maximum aperture of f/2.0, the Osmo Action 6 is particularly good in low light conditions and delivers significantly improved image quality. In combination with the macro lens, you can take breathtaking close-ups of food, pets and much more with a very shallow depth of field at a short shooting distance. The Osmo Action 6 is equipped with a 1/1.1-inch sensor that allows you to shoot at up to 4K/120 frames per second in 4:3 format and delivers clear details even in low light and high-contrast scenes. The Osmo Action 6 is equipped with the square sensor developed by DJI and for the first time features 4K Custom Mode, which allows you to shoot first and then crop. Free cropping in different aspect ratios gives you more flexibility for your creative work. With the larger sensor, larger aperture and noise reduction technology, the Osmo Action 6 enables SuperNight mode, which allows you to shoot pure, detailed video at up to 4K/60fps even in low light conditions.

name: Neo 2 Fly More Combo
desc: The Neo 2 Fly More Combo is a state-of-the-art camera drone suitable for both beginners and experienced users. With a maximum video resolution of 4K and a frame rate of up to 60 fps, it allows for impressive recordings in outstanding quality. The drone is equipped with a powerful 12-megapixel image sensor that delivers sharp photos. Thanks to its compact design and a weight of only 151 grams, it is easy to transport and ideal for outdoor adventures. With a battery life of up to 19 minutes and a range of up to 7000 meters, it offers plenty of room for creative aerial shots. Control is conveniently done via a smartphone, making operation intuitive and user-friendly. The Neo 2 Fly More Combo is thus a versatile solution for anyone looking to explore the world from a new perspective. DJI Neo 2 Fly More Combo DJI Mini 4K Fly More Combo DJI Mini 3 with RC Controller DJI Neo 2 (Drone Only)

name: Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo (DJI RC2)
desc: The DJI Mini 5 Pro features a 1-inch CMOS camera, omnidirectional obstacle detection at night, a gimbal with 225° of flexible rotation and an improved ActiveTrack 360°, all in its signature lightweight body. With performance on par with flagship drones, it captures life's best moments and preserves your precious memories in stunning detail. The Mini 5 Pro has an ultra-lightweight, palm-sized, foldable design that fits easily into a backpack or bag. It is C0-certified, allowing hassle-free flights to most EU member states. With 42 GB of internal memory, footage can be stored directly, ensuring uninterrupted flight enjoyment. With its 50 MP CMOS sensor (1 inch) and f/1.8 aperture, the Mini 5 Pro captures detailed and clean images in low light. Despite its compact size, it delivers professional-quality images. The Mini 5 Pro is equipped with a 1-inch CMOS sensor that supports 4K/60fps HDR video recording with a dynamic range of up to 14 stops for cinematic images. This large sensor, enhanced by image processing technology and intelligent algorithms, preserves even the smallest details in low light conditions, such as sunsets and nighttime landscapes, to deliver footage that is simply stunning. The 48mm Med-Tele mode makes subjects stand out more in the frame, while portrait optimisation algorithms capture every expression with remarkable clarity. With 2x zoom, the 48mm Med-Tele mode now offers higher display resolution than the digital zoom of the previous DJI Mini Pro series. Subjects stand out with more texture, adding depth to your aerial shots. With DJI's portrait optimisation technology, the DJI Mini 5 Pro improves the brightness, contrast and skin tones of portraits. Whether it's a group shot or a snapshot, portraits look natural and have a more vivid expression. The 48mm Med-Tele mode further emphasises subjects with lifelike vibrancy. DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo (DJI RC2) DJI Neo 2 Fly More Combo

name: Osmo Nano (128GB)
desc: Lightweight and ready for anything - with Osmo Nano you can capture every moment of your life spontaneously and effortlessly. Whether cycling, running, from big adventures to small moments in everyday life: Osmo Nano delivers razor-sharp and vivid images that bring every memory to life again and again. The slim, magnetic design opens up completely new perspectives hands-free - and lets you tell your story in a whole new way. Thanks to its ultra-compact design, magnetic attachment on both sides and versatile accessories, Osmo Nano can be flexibly attached to different positions. This allows you to discover creative shooting angles that you could hardly have imagined - and enjoy maximum creative freedom. With a 1/1.3-inch sensor and a powerful image processor, the Osmo Nano offers a dynamic range of up to 13.5 f-stops and delivers image quality that rivals professional cameras. The impressive image processing guarantees razor-sharp, detailed images - regardless of whether in low light or bright sunshine. Small and lightweight, yet remarkably powerful, the Osmo Nano makes shooting effortless. Capture every moment in razor-sharp detail - with up to 4K/60fps for video and 4K/120fps for slow motion. Whether you're capturing action-packed sports, landscapes while travelling or special everyday moments, the Osmo Nano's 143° ultra-wide field of view helps you capture more in every image and makes your memories more complete.

name: Neo Fly More Combo
desc: The DJI Neo Fly More Combo also includes an RC-N3 remote control, three batteries and a charging station - for even longer flying fun and more precise shots. Experience a new kind of video production with the DJI Neo, the palm-sized drone designed specifically for vlogging. Weighing just 135g, it's DJI's lightest and most compact drone and is easy to take anywhere. Whether indoors or outdoors, with the DJI Neo you can take breathtaking shots from any perspective - and easily without remote control. Ultralight and portable: At just 135g, the DJI Neo is ideal for travelling. Hand launch and landing: Launch and land the drone directly in the palm of your hand - no remote control required. AI subject tracking: Always stay in the centre of your shots, whether you're doing sports or going for a walk. Ultra-stabilised 4K video: Create high-quality, stable 4K videos with the integrated camera. Various control options: Control the DJI Neo with the DJI Fly app, via voice commands or classic RC control. Internal memory: 22 GB of internal memory offers space for 40 minutes of 4K/30fps video recordings. Easy editing: Use the DJI Fly app to quickly edit and directly share your videos. Safe flight: The DJI Neo remains stable in the air even in winds up to level 4 and automatically returns to the take-off point. Long flight time: With a flight time of up to 18 minutes, you can enjoy more than 20 flights right from the palm of your hand. Wireless charging: Charge the drone directly with a Type-C cable or use the two-way charging station for maximum convenience. Take your vlogs to the next level. Whether beginner or pro, with the DJI Neo everyone becomes a director.

name: Osmo 360 Standard Combo
desc: The square HDR image sensor was specially developed for 360° images and offers the same 360° field of view as a conventional 1-inch sensor - with 25% higher sensor utilisation. The result is outstanding image quality with lower power consumption - all in an ultra-compact, lightweight camera body. The Osmo 360 is DJI's first camera to offer native 8K/30fps 360° video with large 2.4μm pixels. With an impressive 13.5 stops of dynamic range, it captures sharp, vivid footage - even in high-contrast scenes such as nighttime cityscapes or sunrises and sunsets. With support for ultra-high resolution 8K/50fps 360° video, the Osmo 360 sets a new standard for 360° cameras. Capture every second in stunning detail with high frame rate 360° video (4K/100fps). Enjoy ultra-smooth, fluid images and utilise up to 4x slow motion to make fleeting, impressive moments last even longer. All Osmo 360 video formats support 10-bit colour depth and capture over a billion colours for incredibly rich, lifelike footage. Switch to D-Log-M mode to utilise an even greater dynamic range and bring out more detail in highlights and shadows. This gives you more flexibility in post-processing and opens up limitless creative possibilities. The innovative square sensor design enables two 1-inch 360° fields of view, while the large f/1.9 aperture significantly increases light capture. Even in low light conditions, you can take razor-sharp, detailed shots in flagship quality.

name: Mini 4 Pro Fly More Combo
desc: The DJI Mini 4 Pro is the most advanced mini camera drone to date. It integrates powerful imaging features, omnidirectional obstacle avoidance, ActiveTrack 360° with tracking mode, and a 20 km FHD video transmission that appeals to both professionals and beginners alike. You can take off whenever inspiration strikes. Weighing less than 249 g, the Mini 4 Pro is designed for convenient use on the go. Thanks to the drone's lightweight design, no training or registration is required in most countries and regions. The Mini 4 Pro camera, equipped with a 1/1.3-inch CMOS sensor with Dual Native ISO Fusion, f/1.7 aperture, and 2.4 μm 4-in-1 pixels, allows you to capture more complex details effortlessly. More highlights and shadow details with a high dynamic range ensure uncompromising results in every frame. With 4K/60 fps HDR and 4K/100 fps video, you can capture vibrant scenes with the details they deserve. 10-bit D-Log M and HLG help to capture a stunning color palette and provide more flexibility for editing and sharing. Capture the natural wonder of every moment. With 4K/60 fps HDR, you can share the nuances of a sunset or sunrise in lifelike quality.

name: Case Fan Hub
desc: The function of the Arctic Case Fan Hub is as simple as it is brilliant: it allows for the control of up to ten 4-pin fans with a PWM signal right out of the box. To set it up, simply connect the included 4-pin PWM cable to a 4-pin fan header on the motherboard and connect the SATA power cable to the power supply. Now, you can directly connect up to ten 4-pin fans to the hub and control them via a PWM signal. Overview of the Arctic Case Fan Hub: PWM Control via MotherboardWith the 10-port fan hub from Arctic, you can operate and simultaneously control up to ten 4-pin PWM fans using just one 4-pin connection on the motherboard. The fan hub connects to a free 4-pin port on the motherboard and is powered via SATA from the power supply. That's it. All connected fans will now be controlled via a PWM signal. The speed signal from the first fan is read and passed on to the motherboard. The separate power supply via the SATA power cable ensures a continuous power flow and prevents overloading the 4-pin port on the motherboard. For installation in the case, two self-adhesive Velcro strips and magnetic strips are included. These allow for flexible placement of the hub, for example, on the back of the motherboard tray.
